summary: Implemented ToolOrchestra-inspired efficiency metrics system tracking wall time, agent count, retry count per task and three-reward signal framework: Outcome Reward (+1.0 success | 0.0 partial | -1.0 failure), Efficiency Reward (0.0-1.0 based on resources vs baseline), Preference Reward (inferred from user actions), with weighted aggregation: 60% outcome, 25% efficiency, 15% preference.
